upgradeHint: Upgrade to Pro for more features
lineHelpText: Automatically posts a message to a LINE group whenever a new job is created. Create a LINE Official Account in the LINE Developers Console, enable the Messaging API, and paste the Channel Access Token below. Then add the bot to your LINE group and find its Group ID (e.g. temporarily set the bot's webhook URL to a tool like webhook.site, send any message in the group, and read "source.groupId" from the captured event).
backupHelpText: Download all of your company's data (inventory, jobs, equipment sets, quotes, etc.) as a single JSON file to keep your own backup copy — this file contains only your company's data (Supabase also keeps automated server-level database backups as an extra layer).
roleAdminDesc: Full access, including Settings and team management
roleManagerDesc: Stock, Jobs, Finance — cannot manage Settings
roleCrewDesc: Jobs page only — check in/out and report incidents
pushHelpText: Enable browser/mobile push notifications — e.g. job assignments, job updates, pull sheet assignments, or new stock — even when STAK isn't open.
pushUnsupported: This device or browser doesn't support push notifications
pushPermissionDenied: Notification permission denied — please allow notifications in your browser settings
